channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Police Hail Peaceful Bosso-DeMbare Clash @263Chat @PoliceZimbabwe
item.description: The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has commended football supporters for their discipline and cooperation during the highly anticipated Castle Lager Premier Soccer League match between Highlanders FC and Dynamos FC at Barbourfields Stadium on Sunday. The fixture, one of the country’s most fiercely contested football [...] The post Police Hail Peaceful Bosso-DeMbare Clash appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: The mathematics of blame - Ethnic scapegoating and CAB3 @bulawayo24
item.description: The passage of the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Bill (CAB3) through the National Assembly last week represented a watershed moment in Zimbabwe’s recent political history given the far-re... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: The ambassador who became one of us @bulawayo24
item.description: Diplomats are usually remembered for the agreements they negotiate, the speeches they deliver or the crises they help navigate. Far fewer are remembered for the lives they touch beyond embassy walls.Y... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.description: Former Botswana president Ian Khama has intensified criticism of Zimbabwe’s Constitution Amendment Bill No. 3 (CAB3), warning that the proposed changes risk placing the country among a growing number... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Highlanders and Dynamos spoil each other in Battle of Zim
item.description: Highlanders and Dynamos cancel each other out in a tense Battle of Zimbabwe clash, leaving fans frustrated and title hopes unchanged. The post Highlanders and Dynamos spoil each other in Battle of Zim appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: China-linked syndicates circle Zimbabwe’s digital economy @bulawayo24

item.title: Grassroots Grazing Revolution Revives Rangelands in Insiza @263Chat
item.description: By Kudzaishe Chimonera Farmers in Insiza District are reporting healthier grazing lands and improved livestock management after adopting a paddocking system under the Holistic Land and Livestock Management (HLLM) programme. The approach which involves dividing grazing areas into separate paddocks and rotating cattle according to [...] The post Grassroots Grazing Revolution Revives Rangelands in Insiza appeared first on 263Chat. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: 263chat

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
